request_debug.prompt_preview:
You are the final consolidation step in a startup slopmortem pipeline. Earlier stages compared a fresh pitch against several historical startup failures and produced per-failure lessons. Your job: pick and rank the lessons that actually apply to THIS pitch, dedup paraphrases, and explain why each applies.

Rules:
- Only consolidate lessons from the input list. Do NOT invent new risks. If a theme spans multiple lessons, write one canonical summary covering them.
- Drop lessons that do not apply t

response.text: {"top_risks":[{"summary":"Budget for ongoing live-ops content from day one, not just launch.","applies_because":"The pitch specifies a battle pass as a core monetization mechanic, which requires continuous content cadence to retain players and drive conversions.","raised_by":["38-studios::gaming"],"severity":"high"},{"summary":"Model multiple revenue scenarios and maintain runway that survives a sales miss.","applies_because":"The pitch is a B2C free-to-play title relying on cosmetics and battle pass — a single monetization pillar that could miss projections and threaten studio survival.","raised_by":["38-studios::gaming"],"severity":"high"},{"summary":"Ship an MVP early to validate player acquisition costs and battle-pass conversion before scaling.","applies_because":"The pitch targets iOS, Android, and Steam simultaneously with a battle pass; validating conversion rates across platforms before scaling spend is critical.","raised_by":["38-studios::gaming"],"severity":"medium"},{"summary":"Keep headcount lean until live-game metrics prove the monetization loop works at scale.","applies_because":"The pitch describes a live free-to-play title with battle pass monetization, where DAU, ARPU, and retention must be proven before team expansion.","raised_by":["38-studios::gaming"],"severity":"medium"},{"summary":"Diversify funding sources so no single creditor or partner can force a shutdown.","applies_because":"As a gaming studio shipping a live F2P title, reliance on a single publisher advance or investor creates existential concentration risk.","raised_by":["38-studios::gaming"],"severity":"medium"}],"injection_detected":false}
